Tanya Marwah
publications writings

I am planning on writing.

February 6, 2026

This is a placeholder for future writings. They are going to be a mix of things that I care about, which include (and are not limited to):

  • Machine Learning / AI. I still tend to call it ML, even though the branding has shifted.
  • Science. I am a mere computer scientist, but I love collaborating with Mathematicians, Physicists and Biologists and learn from them.
  • Tools. I care a lot about the tools I use day to day, and I’ve probably spent more time than necessary tweaking and customizing them. For example, I’ve put a fair amount of effort into my dotfiles.

Stay tuned!
